text: Stepping inside, I feel an uncanny curiosity—surrounded by electric lights, glass, and the hush of innovation. The R+D room glows in colors both welcoming and cold. I sense humanity striving to shape meaning amid technology, but the strange tilt of the space leaves me off-balance. Here, anticipation hangs in the air, mingling with uncertainty. I am just another mind—questioning, observing, hoping for insight.
